metadata.note: The nine SRD 5.2 player species. Mechanical effects that map onto the character graph carry a `component` (resistances, speed, HP); chosen resistances (Dragonborn ancestry, Tiefling legacy) are templates filled via `choices`.

species.name: Dragonborn

traits.name: Draconic Ancestry
traits.description: Your lineage stems from a dragon progenitor. Choose a dragon from the Draconic Ancestors table; it sets your Breath Weapon and Damage Resistance damage type.

traits.name: Breath Weapon
traits.description: When you take the Attack action, you can replace one attack with an exhalation in a 15-foot Cone or 30-foot Line; creatures make a Dexterity save (DC 8 + Con mod + proficiency) for 1d10 of your ancestry's damage type (half on success), scaling with level. Uses = proficiency bonus per Long Rest.

traits.name: Damage Resistance
traits.description: You have Resistance to the damage type determined by your Draconic Ancestry.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: You have Darkvision with a range of 60 feet.

species.description: The result of draconic forebears, Dragonborn share many traits with dragons, including a damaging breath weapon and resistance to a damage type tied to their ancestry.

species.name: Dwarf

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: You have Darkvision with a range of 120 feet.

traits.name: Dwarven Resilience
traits.description: You have Resistance to Poison damage and Advantage on saving throws to avoid or end the Poisoned condition.

traits.name: Dwarven Toughness
traits.description: Your Hit Point maximum increases by 1, and it increases by 1 again whenever you gain a level.

traits.name: Stonecunning
traits.description: As a Bonus Action you gain Tremorsense 60 ft for 10 minutes while on/touching stone; uses = proficiency bonus per Long Rest.

species.description: Bold and hardy, dwarves are a tough folk with a deep affinity for stone and an inborn resistance to poison.

species.name: Elf

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: You have Darkvision with a range of 60 feet (120 feet for Drow lineage).

traits.name: Fey Ancestry
traits.description: You have Advantage on saving throws to avoid or end the Charmed condition.

traits.name: Keen Senses
traits.description: You have proficiency in the Insight, Perception, or Survival skill.

traits.name: Trance
traits.description: You don't need to sleep and can't be put to sleep by magic; you finish a Long Rest in 4 hours of light activity.

traits.name: Elven Lineage
traits.description: Choose a lineage (Drow, High Elf, or Wood Elf) granting a cantrip and further benefits as you level.

species.description: Elves are a magical people of otherworldly grace, at home in nature and possessed of a keen mind and fey resilience to enchantment.

species.name: Gnome

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: You have Darkvision with a range of 60 feet.

traits.name: Gnomish Cunning
traits.description: You have Advantage on Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma saving throws.

traits.name: Gnomish Lineage
traits.description: Choose Forest Gnome (Minor Illusion + speak with Small beasts) or Rock Gnome (Mending, Prestidigitation, tinker devices).

species.description: Small and energetic, gnomes are inventive and curious, with a natural cunning that shields their minds from magic.

species.name: Goliath

traits.name: Giant Ancestry
traits.description: Choose a supernatural boon from your giant ancestors (Cloud/Fire/Frost/Hill/Stone/Storm Jotun), usable a number of times equal to your proficiency bonus per Long Rest.

traits.name: Large Form
traits.description: Starting at character level 5, as a Bonus Action you can become Large for 10 minutes (if room), gaining Advantage on Strength checks and +10 speed; once per Long Rest.

traits.name: Powerful Build
traits.description: You have Advantage on saves against being Grappled and count as one size larger for carrying capacity.

species.description: Towering descendants of giants, goliaths are powerfully built wanderers whose fast stride and giant boons set them apart.

species.name: Halfling

traits.name: Brave
traits.description: You have Advantage on saving throws to avoid or end the Frightened condition.

traits.name: Halfling Nimbleness
traits.description: You can move through the space of any creature that is a size larger than you.

traits.name: Luck
traits.description: When you roll a 1 on the d20 of a D20 Test, you can reroll and must use the new roll.

traits.name: Naturally Stealthy
traits.description: You can take the Hide action even when obscured only by a creature at least one size larger than you.

species.description: Halflings are a cheerful, practical folk, famously lucky and brave out of proportion to their small size.

species.name: Human

traits.name: Resourceful
traits.description: You gain Heroic Inspiration whenever you finish a Long Rest.

traits.name: Skillful
traits.description: You gain proficiency in one skill of your choice.

traits.name: Versatile
traits.description: You gain an Origin feat of your choice.

species.description: Humans are the most adaptable and ambitious of the common peoples — innovators, achievers, and pioneers, defined by their versatility.

species.name: Orc

traits.name: Adrenaline Rush
traits.description: You can take the Dash action as a Bonus Action and gain temporary Hit Points equal to your Proficiency Bonus; uses = proficiency bonus per Short or Long Rest.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: You have Darkvision with a range of 120 feet.

traits.name: Relentless Endurance
traits.description: When reduced to 0 HP but not killed outright, you can drop to 1 HP instead; once per Long Rest.

species.description: Orcs are a tenacious people of furious bursts of speed and stubborn endurance, able to shrug off blows that would fell others.

species.name: Tiefling

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: You have Darkvision with a range of 60 feet.

traits.name: Fiendish Legacy
traits.description: Choose a legacy (Abyssal, Chthonic, or Infernal). It grants a thaumaturgy-style cantrip and additional spells as you level, and a damage resistance: Abyssal→Poison, Chthonic→Necrotic, Infernal→Fire.

traits.name: Otherworldly Presence
traits.description: You know the Thaumaturgy cantrip, cast with the spellcasting ability of your Fiendish Legacy.

species.description: Tieflings carry a fiendish bloodline, marked by horns or other features and an innate resistance tied to their otherworldly legacy.
